title: mollugo cerviana
intro: Mollugo cerviana, also known as carpet weed or creeping Charlie, is a type of herbaceous plant that belongs to the family Molluginaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Mollugo cerviana include its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, sore throat, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are often dried and used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
